name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America is a nationally recognized payday and installment lender offering same-day loans up to $1,000 in-store and title loans up to $25,000 online.
description_long:
Advance America is one of the largest consumer short-term lending chains in the United States. The company describes itself as "nationally recognized" and "fully accredited," operating physical retail stores across multiple states while also offering online applications. The Jacksonville North Edgewood location is a full-service branch serving the Commonwealth Village area, staffed by bilingual (English/Spanish) employees and open six days a week.

The company offers three primary loan products. Payday Loans range from $100 to $500 and are designed as two-to-four-week bridge loans between paychecks. Installment Loans range from $100 to $1,000 and allow repayment over multiple scheduled payments, making them a slightly longer-term option. Title Loans, offered online in partnership with LoanCenter, go from $2,000 up to $25,000, using a paid-off vehicle as collateral. The store also provides Western Union money transfer services. Applicants need a government-issued ID, proof of income, a checking account, and a Social Security Number or ITIN.

Advance America's most measurable differentiator is its customer satisfaction rating: 4.9 out of 5 stars based on 125,388 verified reviews, with over 200,000 Google reviews cited. The store offers three application channels — walk-in, online, or phone pre-qualification — giving borrowers flexibility to start the process before visiting in person. Spanish-speaking staff at the branch reduces friction for non-English-speaking customers, and the referral rewards program adds an incentive for repeat customers.

Honestly, Advance America's products serve a specific and high-cost niche. Payday loans, by definition, carry triple-digit annualized percentage rates and are structured to be repaid in full on the borrower's next payday — a cycle that can become expensive if the loan rolls over. Installment loans offer a longer runway but are still far more expensive than bank personal loans or credit union alternatives. Title loans carry foreclosure risk on the borrower's vehicle. These products are suitable only for genuine short-term emergencies where the borrower has a concrete repayment plan and no access to cheaper credit.
address: 8106 Long Beach Blvd Unit A, South Gate, CA 90280

company_info.headquarters: 8106 Long Beach Blvd Unit A, South Gate, CA 90280

pros: Same-day funding available both in-store and online
Installment loans offer multi-payment repayment — more structured than a lump-sum payday loan
Phone pre-qualification available before visiting the branch
Title loans up to $25,000 for vehicle owners needing larger amounts
Multiple application channels: walk-in, online, or by phone
cons: Payday loans capped at $500 — insufficient for emergencies requiring more than that
Payday loans are 2-to-4-week term products that typically carry triple-digit APRs
Title loans require a fully paid-off vehicle registered in the borrower's name
Store closed Sundays — no walk-in access one day a week
Title loans are processed via a third-party partner (LoanCenter), not directly by Advance America
best_for: Borrowers needing $100–$500 quickly before their next paycheck with a clear repayment plan
Consumers who prefer in-person service and value bilingual (Spanish-speaking) staff
Vehicle owners who need $2,000–$25,000 and have a fully paid-off car title
Borrowers who want installment-style repayment rather than a single lump-sum payoff
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for borrowers facing a genuine short-term cash shortfall — typically $100 to $1,000 — who need funds the same day and have no access to cheaper credit. The main caveat is cost: payday loans in particular carry very high effective APRs and should only be used when the borrower is confident they can repay in full on their next payday without rolling the loan over.
services: Title Loans ($2,000–$25,000, online via LoanCenter partnership)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
